attacking_style: Pure sprinter who targets flat to downhill finishes in bunch sprints. Not an attacker; relies on positioning in final kilometer and explosive speed in last 200-300m.
team_tactics: Does not require elaborate leadout train to achieve results, showing adaptability. However, coordination through technical finales remains inconsistent, particularly through tight corners in final kilometer.
terrain_preference: Downhill sprint finishes suit him best where positioning matters more than pure power. Technical finales with tight corners expose team coordination weaknesses.
vulnerability: Loses position and results when team cohesion breaks down in technical finales, especially through penultimate corners. Needs tighter coordination when organized leadout is attempted.
key_patterns: Can podium without designated leadout train on favorable downhill finishes (2 observations)
Team coordination breaks down through technical corners in sprint finales (2 observations)
Adaptable sprinter who delivers results with varied team support structures (2 observations)
form_trajectory: positive: Third place at 2020 Vuelta shows maturation and ability to perform at Grand Tour level without perfect team support
